2604.24544.title: STELLAR-E: a Synthetic, Tailored, End-to-end LLM Application Rigorous Evaluator
2604.24544.paper_summary: The increasing reliance on Large Language Models (LLMs) across diverse sectors highlights the need for robust domain-specific and language-specific evaluation datasets; however, the collection of such datasets is challenging due to privacy concerns, regulatory restrictions, and the time cost for manual creation. Existing automated benchmarking methods are often limited by relying on pre-existing data, poor scalability, single-domain focus, and lack of multilingual support. We present STELLAR-E - a fully automated system to generate high-quality synthetic datasets of custom size, using minimal human inputs without depending on existing datasets. The system is structured in two stages: (1) We modify the TGRT Self-Instruct framework to create a synthetic data engine that enables controllable, custom synthetic dataset generation, and (2) an evaluation pipeline incorporating statistical and LLM-based metrics to assess the applicability of the synthetic dataset for LLM-based application evaluations. The synthetic datasets reach an average difference of +5.7% in terms of LLM-as-a-judge scores against existing language-specific benchmarks, demonstrating comparable quality for comprehensive assessment of big and small LLMs. While real datasets remain slightly more challenging for LLMs especially for smaller models, this work establishes a scalable and domain-adaptable benchmarking framework that supports fair evaluation of LLM applications, offering a faster alternative to manual approaches and enabling high-efficiency automated quality assurance cycles.
2604.24544.paper_summary_zh: 隨著各個領域對大型語言模型（LLMs）的依賴日益增加，對於穩健的特定領域和語言的評估數據集的需求也隨之增長；然而，由於隱私問題、法規限制以及手動創建的時間成本，收集這些數據集變得具有挑戰性。現有的自動基準測試方法往往受到依賴現有數據、擴展性差、單一領域聚焦以及缺乏多語言支持的限制。我們提出了STELLAR-E——一個完全自動化的系統，能夠生成高質量的自定義大小的合成數據集，僅需最少的人為輸入，且不依賴於現有數據集。該系統分為兩個階段：（1）我們修改了TGRT Self-Instruct框架，創建了一個合成數據引擎，實現可控的自定義合成數據集生成；（2）一個評估管道，結合統計和基於LLM的指標，以評估合成數據集在基於LLM的應用評估中的適用性。合成數據集在LLM作為評判者的得分方面與現有的語言特定基準相比，平均差異為+5.7%，顯示出對於大型和小型LLM的全面評估具有可比的質量。雖然真實數據集對於LLM來說仍然稍具挑戰性，特別是對於較小的模型，但這項工作建立了一個可擴展且適應領域的基準測試框架，支持對LLM應用的公平評估，提供了比手動方法更快的替代方案，並實現高效的自動質量保證循環。
2604.24544.author: Alessio Sordo et.al.
2604.24544.authors: Alessio Sordo, Lingxiao Du, Meeka-Hanna Lenisa, Evgeny Bogdanov, Maxim Romanovsky
